member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IAssemblyTypeScanner
member.summary: Scans assemblies and returns loadable concrete types.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IAssemblyTypeScanner.GetCandidateAssemblies(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Gets candidate assemblies for auto registration.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IAssemblyTypeScanner.GetLoadableTypes(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Gets loadable types from the specified assembly.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IAutoRegistrationFilter
member.summary: Defines a rule that determines whether a type is eligible for automatic registration.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IAutoRegistrationFilter.IsTarget(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified type is eligible for automatic registration.
member.returns: True if the type is eligible; otherwise false.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IAutoRegistrationService
member.summary: Provides automatic service registration features.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IAutoRegistrationService.RegisterAll(System.Reflection.Assembly,Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry)
member.summary: Registers supported types from the specified root assembly.
member.param: The root assembly to scan first.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IConstructorSelector
member.summary: Selects a constructor for object activation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IConstructorSelector.SelectConstructor(System.Type)
member.summary: Selects the constructor to use for the specified implementation type.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IObjectActivator
member.summary: Creates object instances using constructor injection.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IObjectActivator.CreateInstance(System.Type,Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceResolver)
member.summary: Creates an instance of the specified implementation type.
member.param: The resolver used to resolve constructor dependencies.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceContainer
member.summary: Represents a service container that supports both registration and resolution.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry
member.summary: Provides service registration capabilities.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry.Register``1
member.summary: Registers a concrete implementation type as itself with transient lifetime.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry.Register``2
member.summary: Registers a service abstraction with a concrete implementation using transient lifetime.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry.Register``1(System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Registers a factory for the specified service type using transient lifetime.
member.param: The factory used to create the service instance.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry.RegisterSingleton``1(``0)
member.summary: Registers a singleton instance for the specified service type.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry.RegisterSingleton``1
member.summary: Registers a concrete implementation type as itself with singleton lifetime.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry.RegisterSingleton``2
member.summary: Registers a service abstraction with a concrete implementation using singleton lifetime.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry.IsRegistered(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified service type is registered.
member.returns: True if the service type is registered; otherwise false.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceResolver
member.summary: Provides service resolution capabilities.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceResolver.Resolve``1
member.summary: Resolves an instance of the specified service type.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceResolver.Resolve(System.Type)
member.summary: Resolves an instance of the specified service type.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.DependencyInjection.IServiceResolver.TryResolve``1(``0@)
member.summary: Attempts to resolve an instance of the specified service type without throwing.
member.param: The resolved instance, or null if not registered.
member.returns: true if resolved successfully; otherwise false.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Events.IEventBase
member.summary: Marks a type as an explicit Dreamine event contract.
member.remarks: This marker is not intended to be a broad source-generation trigger by itself. Generators and scanners should combine it with explicit Dreamine attributes, naming rules, or namespace rules before treating a type as an automatic target.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Locators.IViewModelResolver
member.summary:
📌 ViewModel 생성 전략을 위한 DI 추상 인터페이스입니다.
Dreamine의 ViewModelLocator와 함께 사용되며, DI 컨테이너 또는 수동 인스턴스화 전략을 연결하는 역할을 합니다.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Locators.IViewModelResolver.Resolve(System.Type)
member.summary: 지정된 ViewModel 타입을 생성하여 반환합니다.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Navigation.INavigator
member.summary: Provides instance-based navigation for an already created ViewModel.
member.remarks: This is the smallest navigation contract and is usually implemented by region-based presenters. Use when a component also needs type-based ViewModel resolution.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Navigation.INavigator.Navigate(System.Object)
member.summary: Navigates to the View that corresponds to the specified ViewModel instance.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Navigation.IViewManager
member.summary: Provides View display operations based on ViewModel instances or ViewModel types.
member.remarks: This is the application-level View display contract. It extends so instance-based and type-based display operations stay in one navigation contract family.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Navigation.IViewManager.Show``1
member.summary: Shows the View that corresponds to the specified ViewModel type.
member.typeparam: The ViewModel type used to resolve the target View.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Navigation.IViewManager.Show(System.Type)
member.summary: Shows the View that corresponds to the specified ViewModel type.
member.param: The ViewModel type used to resolve the target View.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IDialogService
member.summary: Provides dialog presentation services for ViewModels, decoupled from WPF MessageBox.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IDialogService.ShowMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Displays an informational message dialog.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IDialogService.ShowError(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Displays an error message dialog.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IDialogService.Confirm(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Displays a yes/no confirmation dialog.
member.returns: true if the user confirmed; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IDialogService.ShowMessageAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously displays an informational message dialog.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IDialogService.ConfirmAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously displays a yes/no confirmation dialog.
member.returns: true if the user confirmed; otherwise false.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IViewDisplayStrategy
member.summary: Defines how a resolved view is displayed for a given view type. Register custom implementations via ViewManager.RegisterDisplayStrategy to support additional view types without modifying ViewManager.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IViewDisplayStrategy.CanHandle(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns true when this strategy can handle the specified view instance.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IViewDisplayStrategy.Display(System.Object,System.Object,System.Type,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Displays the view with the given ViewModel.
member.param: The ViewModel type (used for key resolution).
true when display should delegate to INavigator if available.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IWindowStateChange
member.summary: Describes a window open-state change without requiring consumers to depend on a concrete event args type.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IWindowStateChange.WindowKey
member.summary: Gets the window key.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IWindowStateChange.IsOpen
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the window is open.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IWindowStateService
member.summary: Provides window open-state tracking.

member.name: E:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IWindowStateService.StateChanged
member.summary: Occurs when a window open-state changes.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IWindowStateService.IsOpen(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the window with the specified key is open.
member.returns: True if the window is open; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IWindowStateService.MarkOpened(System.String)
member.summary: Marks the window with the specified key as opened.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.IWindowStateService.MarkClosed(System.String)
member.summary: Marks the window with the specified key as closed.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.WindowStateChangedEventArgs
member.summary: Provides data for a window open-state changed event.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.WindowStateChangedEventArgs.#ctor(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A value indicating whether the window is open.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.WindowStateChangedEventArgs.WindowKey
member.summary: Gets the window key.

member.name: P:Dreamine.MVVM.Interfaces.Windows.WindowStateChangedEventArgs.IsOpen
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the window is open.
